70010000111316.description:
Upon signing up to a perfectly normal battle of the bands contest for a bit of fun, Faye, Ian and Briff are cursed with an unusual power and find themselves sealed to a horrible fate. Surely there's a way to get out of it, there has to be! Even if it means... *shudder* working together.

Gameplay features:
- 15-20 hours of game time
- Kick down every single door you come across
- 100+ skills, 50+ accessories and 9 classes to customize the band with, each with their own special outfit
- Outfit choices are reflected in ALL dialogue portraits and cutscenes
- Excessive amounts of hand-drawn frame-by-frame animation
- Inventive battle system that combines real-time and turn-based gameplay
- Rich soundtrack spanning a wide variety of genres
- Highly praised writing and humour
- Memorable dungeons - From traversing the hair of a giant tree lady to crowdsurfing through an entire arena
- Item system that says GOOD RIDDANCE to tedious inventory management
- 120+ unique NPCs, all with their own dialogue portraits
- Late game dating segment with 12+ endings
- You can actually use status effects on bosses!
- Singing fish are an integral part of the story
- NEW! Easy mode
- NEW! Bonus area with brutally difficult challenges

This product supports the following languages: English
70010000111316.intro: Melt a face, slap a bass or kiss a drum in this RPG about three idiot musicians. Praised for its refreshing take on the JRPG genre.
70010000111316.name: Deathbulge: Battle of the Bands

70010000118689.description:
Momento is a cozy room decorator with a twist: the objects you choose will alter the course of the story! Decorate your room, choose which items are important to you, and discover how these choices play out over the course of a lifetime.

Begin in childhood, picking out toys that represent your dreams for the future. Follow those dreams into adulthood, exploring wildly different settings and themes. Uncover stories of heartbreak, wonder and love, and learn the significance behind the sentimental treasures that follow you throughout. Pay close attention - some objects may be more than they seem at first glance.

Click your way through a delightfully tactile world, switching on lights, leafing through books, petting adorable animals, and more! Collect items and furniture in story mode to play with in the endless creative mode. At the end of it all you return to the very beginning, to discover new endings, fresh twists in the path, and explore an evolving story of love and loss.

Embark on a journey where the objects you choose to keep influence the life you lead.

Features:
• Decorative freedom: There’s no right or wrong way to arrange your space!
• Choices matter: Watch small decisions ripple over a lifetime!
• Explore freely: Search every nook and cranny of the level. There’s surprises behind every corner!
• Creative mode: Unlock items and furniture to decorate your own room in creative mode!
• Easter eggs: Solve puzzles to uncover special rewards.
• Gorgeous vibes: Immerse yourself in relaxing scenery and lovely music!
70010000118689.intro: Momento is a cozy room decorator with a twist: the objects you choose will alter the course of the story!
70010000118689.name: Momento

70010000124097.description:
Hunter Desert Simulator: Sniper Rifle challenges you to become a true hunter in the vast, endless stretches of the desert. Explore a large and demanding environment filled with wild animals adapted to harsh conditions, where precision and patience are key to success. Use your sniper skills to track and hunt prey without being detected, taking advantage of rugged terrain and natural elements to stay hidden. Every step counts in this realistic simulation that emphasizes tactical strategy and smart decision-making. 

Key Features: 
-Authentic desert environment: Explore a vast and varied landscape with dunes, rocks, and oases, carefully detailed.
 -Precision shooting: Control a specialized arsenal of sniper rifles designed for long-distance hunting. 
-Realistic wildlife behavior: Animals have natural routines and reactions, requiring observation and careful planning.
 -Strategy and patience: Be silent, use the terrain for camouflage, and plan every move to succeed.
 -Dynamic challenges: Changing environmental conditions and difficult terrain constantly test your hunting skills. 

Get ready to sharpen your senses and master the art of hunting in the heart of the desert.
70010000124097.intro: Do you have the patience to become a master hunter?
70010000124097.name: Hunter Desert Simulator: Sniper Rifle

70010000072387.description:
STORY
In the world of Valdia, legendary monsters reign supreme.
To stand against the ancient beasts that have destroyed countless kingdoms, Luna, a black cat adventurer, is granted a forbidden power by the ancient dragon Selva.
That power is Scale Change, an ancient magic that allows her to freely alter her size.
Now, this tiny adventurer sets out on a journey to surpass the legends.

FEATURES

Master the Power of Scale Change
The defining feature of Lunadra is Scale Change.
Grow into a giant to unleash overwhelming power and devastating wide-area attacks that crush hordes of enemies.
Shrink to a tiny size to gain incredible speed and weave through deadly enemy assaults.
Adapt your size to the situation and experience a unique style of action combat.

Epic Battles Against Legendary Monsters
Standing in your way are the legendary monsters that have long threatened the world.
Massive area attacks, powerful magic, relentless assault patterns, and colossal bodies await.
Prepare for intense battles against gigantic bosses.

Create Your Ultimate Build
Combine Weapon Cards, Support Cards, and Beast Cards to create your own unique combat style.
Unlock a wide variety of abilities, including:
• Teleportation for rapid movement
• Coin Toss attacks that weaponize your gold
• Suction Tornadoes that pull in items from afar
Experiment with countless combinations and discover entirely different ways to play.

Recruit New Companions
As your adventure progresses, new companions will join your party.
Each character comes with unique weapons and abilities, opening up fresh strategies and playstyles.
Choose your favorite allies and take on legendary monsters together.

Intense 10-Minute Battles
Survive relentless waves of enemies in fast-paced battles.
Level up, customize your build, and face off against gigantic bosses.
Enjoy a highly replayable roguelite experience packed with fast-paced action, endless build possibilities, and epic boss battles.

2-Player Co-op Support
Adventure together with friends and family.
Even after being defeated, players remain on the battlefield as ghosts and can be revived by collecting recovery items.
Work together, support each other, and hunt down legendary monsters as a team.

Little One, Surpass the Legends.
70010000072387.intro:
Grow Giant and Challenge Legendary Monsters!
A Survivor-Style Roguelite RPG
70010000072387.name: Lunadra: Luna Awakens the Legendary Dragon

70010000107054.description:
When a boy’s father is suddenly slain by a terrifying lightning demon, he courageously sets out on a quest of vengeance. Take the role of this young hero as he learns to gather and wield powerful demon magic known as Clarity. Run, jump, air dash and swing your sword as you traverse 7 worlds in side-scrolling style, slaying lesser demon spawn and avoiding treacherous traps to reach the boss of each unique stage!

Clarity: The Seven Demons of Vanguardia is an action platforming adventure with a focus on thoughtful reward, all presented in hand-drawn HD style. Customize the experience with multiple difficulty settings. Choose whichever stage you want to tackle first but be mindful to collect demon swords from defeated bosses in an order that grants a strategic advantage against the next. Each demon has an elemental weakness to exploit! Use melee slashes from your swords or execute spells with your staff by consuming the Clarity you’ve claimed from fallen foes. Will you be prepared for the final showdown?

• Hunt menacing demons in the quest to avenge your father!
• Run, jump, slash and air dash as you traverse 7 worlds in side-scrolling style.
• Gather magical Clarity to wield special spells and skills!
• Tackle stages in any order to acquire powerful demon swords.
• Strategically exploit enemies’ elemental weaknesses!
70010000107054.intro: Slay demons to avenge your fallen father in side-scrolling action platforming style!
70010000107054.name: Clarity: The Seven Demons of Vanguardia

70010000127292.description: Grids of Thermometers delivers the relaxed fun of a pen-and-paper logic game right to your fingertips. In each level, you fill a grid of thermometers with mercury. Numbers on the grid edges tell you how many cells must be filled in each row and column.
70010000127292.intro: Try this game inspired by a pen-and-paper classic!
70010000127292.name: Grids of Thermometers

70010000113010.description:
A 2D pixel art roguelike space shooter with plugged resource management, procedural levels and challenging bosses! Hold the controls tight and do not get stranded in the void!

PLUG 'N' SHOOT

- Plug in to recharge your energy and manage your resources.
- Be Careful! Once plugged, you'll only be able to move within the range of your cable!
- Space is plunged into darkness, activate the spacesockets to clear a level and travel to the next sector.

FIGHT

- Choose between 10+ different ships with different gameplay modes!
- Blast your mega-laser!
- Form an army of rescued stranded ships that will fight alongside you!
- Destroy the stages and defeat a large variety of enemies!
- Encounter dangerous and challenging BOSSES after each galaxy in your quest.

SLOW DOWN TIME

Holding the breach, dodging enemy bullets, and piloting through narrow hallways shouldn't be a problem, BUT just in case...
- Your ship is equipped with a futuristic Slow-Mo System that you can use almost whenever you want!
- Luckily for you, it recharges by collecting energy from dead enemies!

UPGRADE

- Pick up BATTERIES and discover +250 combinations of bullet modifiers!
- Get CHIPS of temporary upgrades by destroying enemies!
- Choose between more than 40 upgrades for your ship.
- Optimize charge times, improve your firepower, get more cable length...
- Become invisible to enemies.

And more!
70010000113010.intro: Hyperwired is a roguelike top-down action shooter, where your spaceship has a plug hanging from it.
70010000113010.name: HYPERWIRED

70010000120854.description:
The 'Crayon' series, responsible for children's creativity worldwide, is back with a mysterious jungle theme, 'Crayon Jungle,' going beyond cars, dinosaurs, and animals! In this series, you can meet wild animals hidden throughout the jungle, including brave tigers, playful gorillas, long-necked giraffes, and cute sloths hanging from trees. 

Unleash your children's imagination with an intuitive interface that anyone can easily enjoy without complicated controls, and a variety of colors that perfectly capture the smooth texture of real crayons. Feel the animals you carefully colored come to life, experiencing a sense of accomplishment and emotional stability at the same time. Start your exciting wildlife adventure right now with 'Crayon Jungle,' a safe and creative digital sketchbook that you can unfold anytime, anywhere!
70010000120854.intro: Color adorable animal friends in a lush jungle with your own colors!
70010000120854.name: CRAYON JUNGLE

70010000122774.description:
Get ready for an action-packed adventure in Noodlebound, a 2D pixel art platformer that combines precise movement with direct and dynamic combat. Take on the role of a ramen samurai on a journey to recover ingredients that have come to life due to a mage’s magic, facing enemies, traps, and bosses across 30 stages full of personality.

With abilities such as jumping, dashing, and close-range attacks, every challenge demands quick reflexes and sharp decisions. The levels are intense and engaging, perfect for players who enjoy fast-paced action, challenging combat, and charismatic characters.

Explore environments filled with danger, face enemies with unique behaviors, and prove your skill in epic boss battles. In every stage, you will need to observe patterns, act with precision, and master your abilities to progress.

Sharpen your blade, keep the rhythm, and fight to restore the balance of flavors.
70010000122774.intro: Slice, Dash, and Recover the Lost Flavor
70010000122774.name: Noodlebound

70010000122818.description:
Get ready to use your ears! Time your button presses to the beat in this broad collection of rhythm games that are easy to learn and rewarding to master. Catch flying veggies, bounce fruit off your biceps, swing sledgehammers, and more as you focus on catchy original music—including tracks by renowned Japanese musician Tsunku♂. 

Boost frogs into the air, flap umbrellas, and so much more in over 80 rhythm games—and that’s just solo mode!

Cooperate and compete in over 30 rhythm games for up to four players

Gather up to four players* around a single system to slice arrows, pluck hair from onions, and more. Whether you’re striving to see who can be first to snatch the cake, or teaming up to save the prince with the power of tennis, these games are sure to test your ability to keep the beat.

Become a magician and use the power of rhythm to beat monsters in Beatspell

As you progress in the game, you'll gradually unlock Beatspell—a mode in which you combat monsters with rhythm-based spells, like fire and healing, by tapping buttons to the beat. What spells will strike a chord when you face down your foes?
70010000122818.intro: Tune in and groove to a collection of games that will challenge your rhythm
70010000122818.name: Rhythm Heaven™ Groove

70010000125188.description: Gather, control, and lead your army on the road to glory. No obstacle can stop you. Prepare for the final battle and defeat every opponent along the way. Lead the army with care - your soldiers believe in you!
70010000125188.intro: Gather and lead your army to the finish line! Face your enemies and win the battle!
70010000125188.name: The Boys Escape

70010000125724.description:
Bus, train and toilet friendly puzzle game created to test your power of logic.

Complete each level by turning all the tiles to a single color. 

All levels can be completed in 4 moves or less if you are skilled enough.

Good luck!!!


Features:

- 70 challenges to start, with more coming soon.
- Complete each level casually for a bronze or silver medal, or try and beat the game with all golds!
- Minimalistic visual and audio style.
- A Zen puzzling experience.
- Appropriate for all ages.
70010000125724.name: Full Colour Tiles

70010000126142.description:
“Hey, kids! I'm a site supervisor who hates green peas.”

Your job is to operate heavy machinery to pick green peas off the top of shumai.

All you need to operate the heavy machinery are the L and R sticks.
Be bold yet cautious—use precise stick controls to save the site supervisor’s lunch!

Excavators, wheel loaders, forklifts, and cranes.
There are over 40 special moves available for these four types of heavy machinery.
Unlock all the special moves and become a heavy machinery master!
70010000126142.intro: Please use the heavy machinery to remove the green peas from the top of the shumai.
70010000126142.name: Heavy machinery vs Shumai

70010000127136.description:
The ocean was supposed to be dangerous.

Nobody warned you it would be this complicated.

One second you're out on the water minding your business...
The next you're locked in combat with a creature that has terrorized sailors for a thousand years.

You win. You capture her. And then...
She transforms into a stunning anime girl who is now, inexplicably, interested in you.

And yes. You are going on a date with her. An actual date. With a former siren. Who tried to kill you twenty minutes ago.

Every siren you catch reveals a different girl. Every girl has her own personality forged from centuries in the deep: fierce, mysterious, proud, or dangerously sweet. 

Take her out, make the right choices, and watch something impossible start to feel very real. 

Unlock scenes, images, and moments that prove you were never just fishing.

Go deeper. Hunt harder. The stronger the siren, the more unforgettable the girl waiting on the other side.

Your choices decide who falls for you.
The real question is whether you are ready to fall too.


Features:

♥ CAPTURE & TRANSFORM: You beat her in combat. Now she's an anime girl and somehow that's your problem.

♥ LEVEL UP & HUNT HARDER: The strongest sirens don't go down easy. Upgrade your skills, sharpen your gear, and go after the ones that were laughing at you five minutes ago.

♥ TURN-BASED COMBAT: Strategy, timing, and the audacity to think you can handle what comes next.

♥ ROMANCE & VISUAL NOVEL CHOICES: She's not easy to impress. Every date, every word, every decision counts.

♥ CHARACTER COLLECTION: Each girl is shaped by what she was. Ancient, wild, powerful... and now yours to figure out.

♥ MULTIPLE ENDINGS: What you unlock depends entirely on how far you're willing to go.


Strange. Addictive. Surprisingly romantic.
Are you ready to find out what the ocean has been hiding?
70010000127136.intro:
Catch sirens. Transform them. Date them. 
The ocean has no rules anymore.
70010000127136.name: Mermaid Catch: Transform Sirens into Anime Girls

70010000127148.description:
The ocean was supposed to be dangerous.

Nobody warned you it would be this complicated.

One second you're out on the water minding your business...
The next you're locked in combat with a creature that has ruled the deep since before anyone alive can remember.

You win. You capture him. And then...
He transforms into a stunning anime boy who is, against all logic, now part of your life.

And yes. You are going on a date with him. An actual date. With a former siren. Who was trying to destroy you twenty minutes ago.

Every siren you catch reveals a different guy. Every guy carries a personality built from centuries beneath the surface: intense, guarded, chaotic, or quietly impossible to ignore. 

Take him out, make the right choices, and watch something that should not exist start to feel like the most natural thing in the world. 

Unlock scenes, images, and moments that prove this was never just a fishing trip.

Go deeper. Hunt harder. The stronger the siren, the more unforgettable the story waiting on the other side.

Your choices decide who lets you in.
The real question is whether you are ready for what that means.


Features:

● CAPTURE & TRANSFORM: You won the fight. Now he's an anime boy and neither of you saw this coming.

● LEVEL UP & HUNT HARDER: The rarest sirens are the most dangerous ones. Get stronger, upgrade your arsenal, and prove you deserve to even be in the same water as them.

● TURN-BASED COMBAT: These creatures ruled the deep for centuries. They don't go down without a fight.

● ROMANCE & VISUAL NOVEL CHOICES: He remembers what you did to catch him. Make the next moves count.

● CHARACTER COLLECTION: Every boy carries something ancient in him. Getting past it is the real game.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Some doors only open if you earn the trust to reach them.


Strange. Addictive. Surprisingly romantic.
Are you ready to find out what the ocean has been hiding?
70010000127148.intro:
Catch sirens. Transform them. Date them. 
The ocean has no rules anymore.
70010000127148.name: Mermaid Catch: Transform Sirens into Anime Boys

70010000127537.description:
To resist the goblin invasion, the town’s lady lord and the shrine maiden joined forces to summon monsters. 
They kidnapped you and persuaded you to take on the job of raising monster eggs. As time passes, your relationship with them gradually grows closer... 
1. Draw Eggs: Obtain monster eggs of random rarity. 
2. Raise Eggs: Idle and wait for the eggs to grow. 
3. Sell Monsters: Sell the monsters after they mature. 
4. Collect: Complete 200 × 2 monster handbooks. 
5. Story: Events unlock as you continue playing. 
6. Music: Enjoy relaxing lo-fi music while idling.
(Supports Offline Idle)
70010000127537.intro: A relaxing idle collection game with beautiful girls (supports offline). You are an egg keeper helping the girls hatch monster eggs.  200 monster eggs + soothing lo-fi music♪
70010000127537.name: Lofi Witch Hatch

70010000116587.description:
William is a young writer in search of his first literary success. He travels to a distant abbey, shrouded in a vow of silence. Among thick stone walls and unspoken secrets, William slowly immerses himself into the life of the abbey and its silent inhabitants.

What begins as a search for inspiration soon turns mysterious, leading William to uncover not just a story to tell, but a secret that was never meant to be discovered.

Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence is a classic 90s-style point & click adventure featuring dark, detailed pixel art, environmental puzzles, and a deep narrative with touches of black humor.

Explore the abbey, solve mysteries using the items you find along the way, and uncover the secrets hidden within its silent walls.
70010000116587.name: Scholar Adventure: Mystery of Silence

70010000118788.description:
Get ready for a challenge full of excitement, trivia, and passion for the world’s most beloved sport. In Do You Really Know About Soccer?, every correct answer takes you one step closer to the top of the legendary Football Tower, where only true football masters can reach.

Starting with lighter and more accessible questions, you will quickly realize the journey becomes increasingly intense. With every floor, the challenges grow tougher, testing your memory, knowledge, and love for the game. Do you really know everything about soccer?

But climbing the tower is not only about confidence. By answering correctly, you earn points that can be exchanged for special power-ups capable of saving your run during the hardest moments. Choosing the perfect time to use each advantage can make the difference between continuing upward or falling back to the beginning.

With cute visuals, a relaxed atmosphere, and addictive progression, the game transforms every round into the perfect mix of competition, learning, and fun. It is the kind of experience that makes you think “just one more try” while chasing the final floor of the tower.

Perfect for football fans, quiz lovers, and players who enjoy fast and clever challenges, Do You Really Know About Soccer? delivers dynamic matches, exciting tension, and that amazing feeling of getting a difficult answer right at the last second.

Take a deep breath, choose your answer, and prove your football knowledge deserves a place at the top.
70010000118788.intro: Climb the Tower and Prove You Know Soccer
70010000118788.name: Do You Really Know About Soccer?

70010000120237.description:
In the distant past, Edmund lived a quiet life with his father and his younger sister, Leofe. 

Edmund wanted nothing more than to protect his sister...

But, despite Edmund’s best efforts, their relationship crumbled.

Now, almost one thousand years in the future, Edmund has been reincarnated in the same sleepy English village of Fenchapel. 

He’s still grappling with painful memories of his younger sister, who perished centuries ago. 


Edmund’s life changes when he meets a smiley young man called Abel with a mischievous streak. He soon learns that there’s more to Abel than meets the eye, and he begins to see in his new companion in a new light.


Features
* Slice of life boys love visual novel
* Timeless romance story with 85,000 words
* Original art and music
* A linear story with no choices or branches
* A happy ending
* Two pretty boys to stare at
70010000120237.intro: A sweet slice of life visual novel
70010000120237.name: In Fair Spirits

70010000123590.description: Join Kitsune, a curious fox spirit, and the powerful deity Nyaneko on a serene quest across enchanted realms. From the rhythmic rails of the Water Train Station to the neon glow of the Mushroom Council, every map is a living illustration teeming with secrets. Solve gentle puzzles, meet quirky Yokai, and uncover the stories hidden in the details.
70010000123590.intro: Step into a hand-drawn world of whimsy in Lost Little Things, a cozy hidden object adventure for the soul.
70010000123590.name: Lost Little Things

70010000124309.description:
Park with precision and complete a wide range of driving challenges in tight and controlled environments. In Parking Simulator: Retro Car Driving, your main objective is to move your car carefully and park it correctly within the marked zone while avoiding collisions and staying within the level conditions.

Each level presents a different parking scenario where you must control your speed, adjust your steering, and use both forward and reverse to align your vehicle perfectly. You’ll need to pay attention to distance, angle, and positioning, especially in narrow spaces where even a small mistake can fail the attempt.

The game gradually increases in difficulty, starting with simple parking tasks and moving toward more complex challenges. As you progress, you’ll face tighter layouts, limited visibility, sharper turns, and obstacles placed in critical positions. Some levels require precise timing and multiple adjustments before reaching the final position.
You will drive through various environments such as open parking areas and underground garages. Each location introduces new challenges and forces you to adapt your driving approach.

The gameplay is built around smooth and responsive controls, allowing you to focus on accuracy and control rather than speed. Camera positioning helps you better understand the space around your car, making it easier to plan your moves and avoid obstacles.

Success depends on patience, precision, and the ability to stay focused in every situation.
Take your time, make every move count, and master the art of parking.
70010000124309.name: Parking Simulator: Retro Car Driving

70070000036709.description:
This pack includes the games:

-Rock ´N Racing Off Road DX
-Golf Up
-Darts Up
-Touchdown Pinball
70070000036709.intro: Enjoy 4 games in 1 with this irresistible games pack!
70070000036709.name: 4 in 1 Sports Bundle Vol 3

70010000117313.description:
Enter A Good Place To Die, where survival depends on skill and quick decisions. Face relentless zombie hordes inside a confined arena where danger never stops. Build your strength as you fight—every successful attack rewards you with points that can be instantly used to improve your weapons. Shape your playstyle on the go, reinforce your defenses with combat turrets, and turn the battlefield in your favor.

Key Features:
- Dynamic third-person combat with roguelite progression
- Arena-based survival against constantly increasing threats
- Instant weapon upgrades driven by combat performance
- Tactical turret placement and upgrades during battles
- Environmental healing mechanics for strategic survival
- Periodic boss encounters that escalate the challenge

Stay focused, adapt your tactics, and push your limits. How long can you hold your ground?
70010000117313.intro: Survive endless zombie waves and grow stronger with every fight.
70010000117313.name: A Good Place To Die

70010000096283.description:
Mythmatch is a narrative-rich, town-building merge game. By day, it's a cozy resource management game where Artemis works with the mortals to rebuild their town and recruit new villagers. But at night, she rises to Olympus to challenge her family in fast-paced arcade minigames to prove she deserves a place in the pantheon.

Features
- Satisfying match-3 gameplay
- Discover new items by merging and crafting
- Repair and expand a thriving community
- Challenge the gods in 4 unique minigames
- Play with a friend in Arcade Mode
- Heartfelt story about found family and belonging
70010000096283.intro: Merge items to build a town and challenge the Greek Gods in Mythmatch.
70010000096283.name: Mythmatch

70010000109827.description:
Experience life as a vampire in a magical town full of werewolves, witches, mermaids, and more! In this heart-warming, supernatural life-sim, you will raise mystical crops, learn spell-casting and potion-making, and befriend – or even romance – the locals. And at the same time, show your skeptical father that a life of compassion is possible – even for the undead.

Settle down in your family’s abandoned homestead and make it your own. Build your farm with magic crops and livestock, customize your cottage with gothic style, and make friends with other creatures of the night. Embrace immortality and unlock ancient abilities, all in the name of a more bountiful harvest. Unravel the mysteries of the seven families that inhabit Moonlight Peaks and bring a bit of light back to this spooky settlement. Just remember to be back in your coffin before the sun comes up!

Key Features
■Uncover a Sweet and Spooky Journey
Customize your perfect vampire persona and build relationships with the people of Moonlight Peaks to learn more about the town’s history. Uncover the secrets of the seven families who dwell there – and maybe even find your “tomb” love from any of the two dozen romanceable characters in the process.

■Build Your Dream Gothic Farmstead
Design your cozy gothic homestead, turning a forgotten farm into the ideal sanctuary. Obtain new tools and develop your property to grow even more enchanted crops and raise magical livestock.

■Harness Magical Powers
Embrace your supernatural lineage! Shapeshift into other forms to explore all the town has to offer, and study witchcraft to learn spells that will help you on the farm or when gathering resources. 

■Delight in Dark Diversions
Beyond the farm, you’ll be able to enjoy fishing, foraging, and potion-crafting, along with activities like embroidering, flower arranging, and more. You can even collect cards for the town’s favorite game, Nokturna, to play against other residents.
70010000109827.intro: Welcome to your new vampiric life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks!
70010000109827.name: Moonlight Peaks

70010000120620.description:
The city has collapsed. Survival is your only objective.
In Rage District - Humanity Armageddon, you step into a broken urban world where chaos has taken control and every street hides danger. Explore abandoned districts, uncover hidden truths, and fight to stay alive in a city consumed by fear and violence.

Move through different sectors filled with ruined buildings, industrial zones, and hidden facilities. Search for resources, gather intel, and uncover what led to the collapse of the city. Every location tells a piece of the story, pushing you deeper into the unknown.

Engage in intense top-down combat using a variety of weapons while managing limited resources. Choose when to fight and when to avoid danger, as every encounter can change your chances of survival. Careful planning and awareness are key in every situation.

Destroy key locations, weaken enemy control, and trigger high-risk encounters against powerful enemies guarding critical areas. Progress is driven by exploration, decisions, and how far you’re willing to go to uncover the truth .

Key Features:
- Top-down survival action gameplay
- Open-ended exploration across multiple districts
- Resource management and tactical decision-making
- Variety of weapons and combat styles
- Intel collection and story discovery
- High-risk encounters and boss fights

Stay alert, explore every corner, and survive the chaos.
In Rage District - Humanity Armageddon, every decision shapes your path.
70010000120620.intro: A broken city where every decision shapes your survival
70010000120620.name: Rage District - Humanity Armageddon

70010000126913.description:
Experience life as a vampire in a magical town full of werewolves, witches, mermaids, and more! In this heart-warming, supernatural life-sim, you will raise mystical crops, learn spell-casting and potion-making, and befriend – or even romance – the locals. And at the same time, show your skeptical father that a life of compassion is possible – even for the undead.

Settle down in your family’s abandoned homestead and make it your own. Uncover the secrets of the seven families who dwell there – and maybe even find your “tomb” love from any of the two dozen romanceable characters in the process.

■Build Your Dream Gothic Farmstead
Design your cozy gothic homestead, turning a forgotten farm into the ideal sanctuary. Obtain new tools and develop your property to grow even more enchanted crops and raise magical livestock.

■Harness Magical Powers
Embrace your supernatural lineage! Shapeshift into other forms to explore all the town has to offer, and study witchcraft to learn spells that will help you on the farm or when gathering resources. 

■Delight in Dark Diversions
Beyond the farm, you’ll be able to enjoy fishing, foraging, and potion-crafting, along with activities like embroidering, flower arranging, and more. You can even collect cards for the town’s favorite game, Nokturna, to play against other residents.
70010000126913.intro: Welcome to your new vampiric life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks!
70010000126913.name: Moonlight Peaks – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70050000073617.description: When you purchase this pack, it will upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ version of Moonlight Peaks to Moonlight Peaks – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.
70050000073617.intro: Welcome to your new vampiric life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks!
70050000073617.name: Moonlight Peaks – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000118661.description:
Take the role of a young man named Nahuel as he travels to his mother’s hometown of San Adraín, a quiet and remote village that he’s never visited before… or so he believes. What Nahuel finds in San Adraín feels oddly familiar, perhaps too familiar to simply be because of the stories his mom told him. The family home almost seems haunted, the townspeople are cautious and distant, everything smells of firewood and neighbors he’s never met act as if they recognize him.

The Fissure is a mature and atmospheric visual novel adventure, a narrative mystery about memory and buried secrets. Guide Nahuel as he explores San Adraín, making key decisions for him along the way. Your choices will determine how the tale unfolds, leading to multiple possible endings and adding new scenes to your gallery. Consider the clues you gather to use in subsequent playthroughs in hopes of uncovering the truth of San Adraín and how Nahuel is connected to its many mysteries!

• Guide a young man as he travels to a remote family home shrouded in old secrets!
• Make key decisions to uncover clues and directly impact the story.
• Explore mature themes across multiple narrative paths and endings!
• Meet memorable characters and investigate hauntingly atmospheric locales.
• Discover the truth of San Adrain and your own past!
70010000118661.intro: Investigate the mystery of an old family home in atmospheric visual novel style!
70010000118661.name: The Fissure

70010000119602.description:
Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 1+2 Dual Collection brings together and updates the apeX of 2D action for new and old players alike.
The Dual Collection includes both Luminous Avenger iX 1 and 2, with all all DLC included, as well as balance adjustments.
It also features a new mode, Endless Battle.

●Revised balance "Director's Cut"
Luminous Avenger iX's Darkness Trigger "berserk" mode has been powered up.
Luminous Avenger iX 2 receives a new "Spike Smash" system, powering up Copen's main weapon, the Razor Wheel.
A number of other adjustments also improve gameplay balance.

●All DLC included
Every item is built in, including content that was previously limited availability.

●New "Endless Battle" mode
Luminous Avenger iX and Luminous Avenger iX 2 each receive a special mode, "Endless Battle". Configure the settings to your liking before facing off against an endless onslaught of random bosses.
How many will you be able to defeat? Take on the apeX challenge!

●Two sci-fi action stories filled with character
Copen is a hard-boiled fighter in a grim future distopia.
Can he save the powerless people he meets? And can they save him?

[Voice Cast]
Copen: Yuma Uchida (Japanese)
           Alejandro Saab (English, iX 2)
Lola: Mayu Mineda (Japanese)
        Cassandra Lee Morris (English, iX 2)
Kohaku: Yumiri Hanamori (Japanese)
            Kira Buckland (English, iX 2)
Blade: Yui Ishikawa (Japanese)
Null: Sumire Morohoshi (Japanese) 
       Natalie Rose Hoover (English)
70010000119602.intro: The complete iX series, refined. The apeX of 2D action reaches a new peak!
70010000119602.name: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 1+2 Dual Collection

70010000122161.description:
Create the workspace of your dreams in My Cozy Workspace - a relaxing simulator where creativity, comfort, and productivity come together. Design and customize rooms by placing furniture, organizing accessories, decorating shelves, and building a cozy atmosphere that feels uniquely yours.

Arrange desks, plants, books, lights, and dozens of decorative items while transforming small empty spaces into inspiring work, whether you prefer a minimalist office, a colorful creative studio, or a warm workspace corner.

Take your time, experiment with different layouts, and enjoy a calm and satisfying experience focused on creativity and relaxation.
70010000122161.intro: Build the workspace you’ve always dreamed of!
70010000122161.name: My Cozy Workspace

70010000124875.description: New gameplay of the classic snake game. Collect the color you need to complete the levels. Pick up boosts to make things easier. Change skins to make your snake look stylish and unique!
70010000124875.intro: A mix of Snakes and Colors for an exciting gameplay experience!
70010000124875.name: Color Snake

70010000091122.description:
Dead Estate is a gory, fast-paced, challenging, roguelike shooter with a heavy emphasis on Halloween and other horror influences. Ascend the floors of a monster-filled mansion with 10 unique characters, collecting loads of items and weapons, tackle grueling challenges, and discover secrets and unlockables along the way!

Beware of the lurking threats on every floor -- some are especially persistent...

HIGH REPLAYABILITY!

- 10 playable characters, each with distinct playstyles and 4 Costumes each
- 150 weapons and 300 items to make each run unique
- Explore the vast complexity of the Estate - discovering alternate floors & floor variants
- An isometric style with compact rooms designed for tense, close-quarters combat
- Try a looped run, or varying difficulty levels to push your skills
- Blessing & Curse run modifiers to maximize replayability
- 20 custom Challenge Runs
- A bounty of secrets to be discovered, and many more to be unlocked

ASSIGNMENT ANYA

An entirely separate campaign inspired by classic survival horror games, set prior to the events of the main game. Play as Anya, a fledgling actress who finds herself helplessly lost in the mansion after her film crew is attacked by the undead.

Abandoned by her leading man and left alone with nothing but a mask to disguise herself with, Anya must escape the increasingly warped and deadly estate all on her own.
70010000091122.name: Dead Estate

70010000110953.description:
Digimon Story Time Stranger is an RPG with monster-taming elements that explores the deep bond between humans and Digimon in an epic story that unravels the mystery of the world’s collapse.

Embark on an adventure that spans across the human world and Digital World, collecting and raising a diverse array of Digimon to fight in turn-based battles.

An Epic Story of Connection
Tokyo, Japan – An agent of a secret organization encounters an unknown creature shortly before a city-leveling explosion. They then reawaken eight years in the past...
Take on a mission to uncover the mystery of the world’s collapse, where chance encounters with unique characters will shape your journey across time and parallel worlds - and change fate itself.

Adventure Between Worlds and Time
Journey between the parallel human world and the Digital World: Iliad where Digimon reside. Explore the Digital World and its intricately detailed realms and discover all of its secrets.

Strategic Turn-Based Battles
Enjoy dynamic turn-based combat that combines strategic elements with evolved battle components. More than 450 Digimon and deep customization options provide limitless ways to approach the challenges of battle and reveal the strength of the bonds formed with your Digimon.

*This product is the Standard Edition. A Deluxe Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful of duplicate purchases.

REGARDING THE DEMO
Get a glimpse of the story with the opening chapter of Digimon Story Time Stranger in this demo. Save data from this demo can also be transferred to the full version of the game.

Complete the demo and gain access to the Central Town - Adventure Trial mode to explore select areas and dungeons of the Digital World: Iliad.

*Central Town - Adventure Trial data cannot be transferred to the full version of the game.
70010000110953.name: Digimon Story Time Stranger

70010000060573.description:
Step into a future where happiness is curated by artificial intelligence, in this gentle-paced puzzle adventure.

The Utopia Project was created in the interest of maximizing human happiness and comfort. As the newest residential Facilitator at D-topia, your role is to resolve issues around the residential community. Tackle fun logic-based puzzles to resolve mechanical issues and keep the facilities running smoothly and meet the many vibrant residents, each with their own unique story and personal struggle.

But what happens when problems go beyond the mechanical? How will your choices impact the wellbeing of the residents, and the future of humanity? In a world of curated happiness, what does it mean to find purpose?

Features:
* A Gentle-Paced, Reflective Adventure: Unwind in a calm, yet thought-provoking journey to discover what happiness truly means. 

* Clever, Integrated Puzzles: Tackle satisfying logic puzzles that connect to the heart of this gentle-paced adventure.

* Meet D-topia’s Residents: Gain their trust, discover their stories, and shape their futures in unexpected ways.

* Your Choices Matter: Guide this artificial intelligence-managed utopia toward joy or despair through your decisions. 

* Step Into Two Worlds: Move between the bright, public reality and the hidden “Block Side” to fix glitches and uncover secrets.
70010000060573.name: D-topia

70010000103705.description:
The calming yet addictive puzzle game is back!
With over 100 hand-crafted puzzles, Kami 2 takes you on a mind-twisting journey that combines logic and problem-solving.

Can you achieve perfection?
Flood each puzzle with a single color in as few moves as possible to claim a 'Perfect' sticker. But watch out for subtle new tricks and fiendish surprises.

Want even more?
Beat the global Daily Challenge, earn a winning streak and compare your scores to other players. Test yourself on thousands of user-generated puzzles, uploaded daily.

Get creative and take on the world.
Craft your own KAMI designs using the Puzzle Builder. Design and share your creations, send them to your friends and challenge the world to beat your score.
70010000103705.name: KAMI 2

70010000106495.description:
Absorb & Transform!

Teeto’s got a talent for absorbing all sorts of objects - and turning them into wild new forms! With Nory’s Vionite-powered backpack, they unlock unique abilities to outsmart enemies, solve puzzles, and discover hidden secrets. Mix it up, get creative, and see what strange new powers you’ll unleash!

Team up Together!

Life’s better with a buddy - and so is saving the world! Grab a friend and dive into split-screen co-op, where you’ll absorb, transform, and explore together. Solve puzzles, help each other out, and take on this wild adventure side by side!

Chaos Corruption!

Chaos is spreading, and the shadow creatures are behind it! Teeto and Nory must team up, using their unique powers to stop the mayhem, restore balance, and keep the world from tipping into complete disorder!

Missing Michaels!

It started with one Michael - Nory’s first experiment. But Michael couldn’t stay simple… he split into two, then four, then eight! Now there are too many Michaels for anyone to handle. Track them down, rescue them, and bring the tiny mischief-makers home!

Lend a Hand, Get a Hand!

Teeto and Nory aren’t the only ones in need of help. Along the way, you’ll meet a colourful cast of quirky characters, each with their own oddball dilemmas. Lend them a hand, and they might just return the favour with useful items, hidden secrets, or unexpected abilities.

Dress The Part

Teeto can unlock a variety of fun and stylish costumes, from the effortlessly cool to the absolutely ridiculous. Saving the world is important - but who says you can’t look fashionable while doing it?
70010000106495.intro: Explore a world of mayhem and Michaels! Join Teeto the blob and Nory the bunny in this 3D adventure platformer to stop the shadow corruption from spreading.
70010000106495.name: Teeto

70010000120332.description:
All those who are lost deserve kindness. Help cute, ghostly bears find peace in this relaxing sequel to the beloved life-sim game where kindness rules and new crafting, building, and camping island adventures await.

Attention, Spirit Scouts! Something spooky is afoot: A bus crash has left you stranded alone on a mysterious (yet delightfully cute) island. Explore the unique island, meet and befriend cute, ghostly spirit bears who need your help to remember their pasts and find peace. Customize a bustling, beautiful campsite — crafting, decorating, and building furniture to bring life and color back to this cute island — and hopefully reunite with your lost scout troop as you gradually repair your bus.

YOUR RELAXING ISLAND OASIS AT THE END OF A STRESSFUL DAY

Whether you're new to the "Cozy Grove" community or a devoted fan, this relaxing follow-up to the beloved life-sim adventure offers something for everyone. This edition of "Cozy Grove" is cuter and cozier than ever, introducing a fresh cast of quirky characters, new animal companions, a new setting and added gameplay features that offer endless ways to unwind at the end of a stressful day. So immerse yourself in a unique, relaxing watercolor art style filled with stunning details and activities to explore. Drop in daily for crafting, decorating, fishing and cooking fun, or embark on new quests to stay busy. Lead with kindness and achieve your camping dreams — customize the cute, spooky island you've always wanted.

FIND NEW FOREVER FRIENDS AND CUTE ANIMAL COMPANIONS

Alongside familiar faces like Flamey and Mr. Kit, new spirit bears are waiting to bond with you and share their backstories. New animal companions are also on the island to offer support and relaxing comfort — now you can pet a dog (!) or have a snail help lighten your load.

NEW SPOOKY MYSTERIES TO INVESTIGATE

Uncover the secrets of the interconnected islands you've landed on as you complete daily quests. As you progress with patience and diligence, you may unlock new areas to explore. Visit dedicated stations for different activities and light up lamps to find bountiful new spots for foraging and mining.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR ISLAND WHILE CRAFTING, DECORATING AND CAMPING

Just because you're living on a haunted island doesn't mean you can't get comfortable! Immerse yourself in crafting and decorating activities, or collect furniture to make the island your own. Plant flowers and fruit trees to harvest, raise ghostly animals and attract pets to your house. And if things start to feel ho-hum, give yourself a custom head-to-toe makeover.

A POSITIVE, HEARTENING DAILY RITUAL

This life-sim game unfolds in sync with real-world time, bringing cute surprises and spooky seasons on the island. If you finish the day's quests, you can cook, craft, collect shells, catch bugs, go fishing, skip rocks or even spruce things up with a new power-washing tool. Rake in rewards as you add to your collection of cute items and earn merit badges for all your accomplishments. A Spirit Scout's work is never done!

Created with love by Spry Fox
70010000120332.intro: All those who are lost deserve kindness.
70010000120332.name: Cozy Grove: Camp Spirit

This edition of "Cozy Grove" is cuter and cozier than ever, introducing a fresh cast of quirky characters, new animal companions, a new setting and added gameplay features that offer endless ways to unwind at the end of a stressful day. So immerse yourself in a unique, relaxing watercolor art style filled with stunning details and activities to explore. Drop in daily for crafting, decorating, fishing and cooking fun, or embark on new quests to stay busy. Lead with kindness and achieve your camping dreams — customize the cute, spooky island you've always wanted.

FIND NEW FOREVER FRIENDS AND CUTE ANIMAL COMPANIONS

Alongside familiar faces like Flamey and Mr. Kit, new spirit bears are waiting to bond with you and share their backstories. New animal companions are also on the island to offer support and relaxing comfort — now you can pet a dog (!) or have a snail help lighten your load.

NEW SPOOKY MYSTERIES TO INVESTIGATE

Uncover the secrets of the interconnected islands you've landed on as you complete daily quests. As you progress with patience and diligence, you may unlock new areas to explore. Visit dedicated stations for different activities and light up lamps to find bountiful new spots for foraging and mining.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR ISLAND WHILE CRAFTING, DECORATING AND CAMPING

Just because you're living on a haunted island doesn't mean you can't get comfortable! Immerse yourself in crafting and decorating activities, or collect furniture to make the island your own. Plant flowers and fruit trees to harvest, raise ghostly animals and attract pets to your house. And if things start to feel ho-hum, give yourself a custom head-to-toe makeover.

A POSITIVE, HEARTENING DAILY RITUAL

This life-sim game unfolds in sync with real-world time, bringing cute surprises and spooky seasons on the island. If you finish the day's quests, you can cook, craft, collect shells, catch bugs, go fishing, skip rocks or even spruce things up with a new power-washing tool. Rake in rewards as you add to your collection of cute items and earn merit badges for all your accomplishments. A Spirit Scout's work is never done!

Created with love by Spry Fox
70050000073922.intro: All those who are lost deserve kindness.
70050000073922.name: Cozy Grove: Camp Spirit – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000066160.description:
Step into the role of a truly hands-on mayor and shape your town from the ground up.

Plan neighbourhoods, optimise logistics networks, and help your community grow - all while juggling workers, infrastructure, suspiciously large tools, visiting robots, aliens & dinosaurs, and the general day-to-day chaos of building your dream town.

And when mayoral duties get a little much, take a break with a spot of fishing, have a spin on the Go-Kart track, or even high-five a cow. 

Play solo for perfect control, or bring friends for co-op mayhem.

Grow Your Town

Lay down your streets, then place businesses, homes, and services where they’ll thrive. Welcome tourists, keep them happy, and give them plenty of reasons to stick around and make your town their home. Hire workers, keep shops stocked, and make sure the money keeps flowing, then upgrade, expand, and unlock new ways to help your town flourish. 

Optimise, Automate, Prosper

Tailor each business, industry zone and building configuration to suit your wants and needs. Assign workers, optimise supply chains, set-up logistics networks and watch your systems flourish. Will you let automation do the heavy lifting, or will you be the Mayor of Micromanagement? 

Bring The Style

As mayor, style starts at home, but it doesn't stop there. Dive into immersive house customisation with full 360° placement and a handy colour picker, then take that creative control across your town with recoloured buildings, and plenty of ways to make every street, shop, and neighbourhood feel uniquely yours. Need a new look while you work? Step into the Change-O-Tron and emerge as the mayor you were always meant to be. Your town. Your mayor. Your style.

Chaotic Co-Op

Team-up with up with another mayor, in either local and online play for just the right amount of teamwork and chaos. Build together, manage together, panic together, and discover how quickly a carefully planned town can go sideways when everyone has a different idea of ‘helping’.
70010000066160.intro: Time to roll up your sleeves, Mayor!
70010000066160.name: Go-Go Town!

70010000071473.description:
Seeking a change in your life, you saw an offer you couldn't refuse; an entire planet at a bargain price! An old agrarian rock that's been abandoned for years in an outlying solar system. So with little more than your worn out ship and your personal assistance droid, you decide to embark on a new phase of your life in a lost corner of the galaxy.

Restore your planet! Cut weeds, clear paths, reclaim fields and fix what the passing of time has destroyed, turn an old agrarian rock into a thriving homestead.

Explore the solar system! Although your ship has seen better days, it will help you to move between the different planets in the system, explore them, collect resources and use them to improve your farm, your tools and your ship.

Be part of the community! Engage with the handful of people who still live on the planets of the solar system, learn their stories and the reasons why they still live in such a remote part of the galaxy.

Save and restore the old glory of the solar system! A whole planet at a bargain price? Maybe things won't be as simple as they seemed, and that planet's low price had a reason to be...
70010000071473.intro: Take your ship, leave the city and thrive on a farm in space.
70010000071473.name: Farlands

70010000087480.description:
Rise to the top of the K-pop charts, become the next sensation, and earn the love of fans. Lead your group to stand out and conquer the hyper-competitive music scene. In this one-of-a-kind idol life simulator, step into the shoes of a powerful manager and shape your girl group’s destiny on their journey to the Hall of Fame.

Step into the spotlight behind the scenes! Build your dream idol group as you scout rising stars, shape their weekly schedules, and guide their journey to fame. Mix work, training, and downtime to help your idols shine their brightest, while you enjoy the thrill of creating a superstar career you can’t experience in real life.

Your decisions extend far beyond management. The relationships you build and the choices you make will define your group’s future. Whether you’re offering unconditional support, navigating rivalries, or representing your group in the public eye, every action has consequences. Randomized events mirror the unpredictable challenges of the real K-pop industry, testing your judgment at every turn.

Your ultimate goal? Debut. Along the way, your trainees will face off against rivals in thrilling, RPG-style battles that will prove whether they have what it takes to shine. Once your group is ready, you’ll choose their signature look, define their fan club identity, and produce a debut album that captures their essence.

The road to debut isn’t an easy path, but it’s where every dream begins, and every step you take becomes a story worth remembering.

- Your Dream K-pop Group: Choose from eight unique trainees, from the cheerful Minji to the shy Ai, the lineup and skillset of your group is in your hands, and it's your job to shape them as stars.
- Plan Their Schedule: As the manager, it's your job to balance stamina, finances, and workload. Push your idols too hard and risk burnout, but pamper them too much and you'll quickly run out of funds!
- Relationships Matter: The bonds you build shape every outcome. Your decisions influence how each character perceives you, unlocking new encounters, storylines and endings.
- Minigames: Scout new idols, hit the right notes during vocal practice, and master dance routines in rhythm challenges. Your performance in these mini-games determines your success as an idol manager.
- Original K-pop Soundtrack: Featuring exclusive music and special vocal tracks for your group's debut, produced just for this game. K-pop fans will be clamouring for the tracklist.
- Visual Adventure: Stunning hand-drawn artwork brings a rich world to life. Beautifully animated emotions and gestures make your idols feel truly alive, letting you connect with them like never before.
70010000087480.intro: Do you have what it takes to debut the ultimate K-pop group?
70010000087480.name: K-pop Idol Stories: Road to Debut

70010000100995.description:
A hidden classic that fuses board and card games, Culdcept features a unique, innovative system that has captivated fans since its debut. Players become Cepters, wielding cards in intense battles where luck and strategy collide. After ten years, a brand-new story begins once again.

●What is Culdcept?
It is a game where you move across the board, claim territories, and build strategies using cards.
Use summons and magic to fight your way to victory.

●Story
Bavrashka, a continent created by the gods.
At its center lies the Royal Cept Academy, an insitute where Cepters are trained to wield the power of stone tablets known as "Culds," fragments of the Culdcept.
Kamur, who transferred to the Cept Academy, has his abilities recognized and is selected for the Royal Cepter Guard Regiment.
Amid battles that threaten the continent, the power of a Cepter begins to awaken.

●Game System
Move with dice and battle with cards—
This is a board game where victory hangs on a mix of luck and strategy.
Experience a more accessible evolution of Culdcept that stays true to the series’ charm.

●Cards
Over 400 cards with all-new visuals.
Combine all kinds of cards to win through the power of your own tactics.

・Creature Cards
These are cards that allow you to summon creatures.
They can help you gain more domains, or take over enemy domains.
There are five elements, and each card has different abilities.

・Item Cards
Item cards support your creatures in battle.
And that's not to say they simply help creatures attack and defend better.
Using the special abilities of items can help you snatch victory from the jaws of defeat!

・Spell Cards
Spell cards can help you build momentum, or put your opponents in a difficult position.
Use them right and you can even turn the tides of the game in the blink of an eye.
Suffice to say, these cards are essential to winning.
70010000100995.intro: Led by dice. Ruled by cards
70010000100995.name: Culdcept BEGINS

70010000105215.description:
Explore the depths of this massive dungeon with your adorable companion Una in this exciting  ROGUE-like deck-building adventure!
Game feature:
• Dynamic Dungeon Layout
Fight through randomly-generated monster-filled dungeons and encounter merchants, treasures and story events. You can only see three levels down, so choose wisely as you push deeper into the dungeon.

• Titillating Card Battles
Build the most powerful deck out of over 50 different cards and 20 different runes and use it to overwhelm your enemies! 

• Random Treasure
Obtain random treasures to upgrade Una's abilities. Put together the strongest combination and synergize it with your deck to deal ungodly amounts of damage!

• An Exciting Story with Multiple Endings
Make choices and experience different endings in this exciting adventure story! Unlock different side stories to trigger various card enchantments. Some enchantments might come in handy, while others might hurt you!
70010000105215.intro: Build your deck and take Una on an epic dungeon adventure!
70010000105215.name: Take Me To The Dungeon!!

70010000111218.description:
It’s the year 197X…

A mysterious force calling itself the Cosmic Demon Empire suddenly launched an assault on Earth, commanding an army of colossal beast-shaped war machines known as the Space Beasts. Meanwhile, at a certain top-secret Space Robot Laboratory somewhere in the Far East, preparations had been made “just in case something like this ever happened”. Thus, the newly developed transforming and combining combat robot GEPPY-X was deployed into action.

Never before released outside of Japan, 70’s-Style Robot Anime GEPPY-X will now be available to play worldwide!

A love letter to Japanese mecha anime from the 70’s, this fast-paced 2D side-scrolling shooter has undergone a transformation of its own. Battle the Cosmic Demon Empire with quality of life improvements such as faster load times, rewind, save states, and more! 

Experience GEPPY-X with subtitles in eight new languages and full restoration of the 8,000 hand-drawn frames from the original Betacam master tapes. The original release squeezed the animation into four discs at 320x240 resolution and only 15fps. For this new release, each “episode” has had its opening theme, previews, commercials, and end credits re-digitized and restored to its original 24fps.

Features
- Never suffer from a mistake or miss a commercial with the ability to rewind
- Save and reload at any point with Save States
- Trophies/Achievements
- Fully restored Betacam tapes re-digitized to 24fps with optional upscaling (optional setting will follow shortly after launch)
- Original Japanese voice overs including iconic voices from classic 90’s anime such as Akira Kamiya, Shō Hayami, Shūichi Ikeda, Ichirō Nagai, Gorō Naya, and more
- Original soundtrack including legendary anime theme artists Isao Sasaki, Akira Kushida, and Hironobu Kageyama
- Localized subtitles (available in English, Japanese, French, Spanish, Italian, German, Korean, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese)
- Transform between three combat forms in real time, mastering balance, speed, and power
Rapid Fire Option：Relax your hands and fire your main and sub weapons by holding button instead of button mashing!

- CRT filters - Relive the retro experience with several filter options, including CRT curvature
- Digital Gameplay Manual
- 6 Unlockable Extra Modes including:
    Boss Rush
    Alternate Timelines
    Experimental Episode Variants
70010000111218.intro:
70s-Style Super Robot Anime Returns.
Transforming Mechs × Arcade 2D Shooter Action.
A Cult Classic Reborn in HD — Now Worldwide.
70010000111218.name: 70s-style Robot Anime Geppy-X
