70010000094826.description:
Learn a dozen abilities, each more amazing than the last!
■ STICKY HONEY - Spread honey on your face to stick to objects and climb walls
■ POWERFUL CHOCOLATE - Use hardened chocolate to break obstacles

A piece of cake?!
■ VACATIONS GONE WRONG - Welcome to the Jam Session Cruise! Lucky you, you just happened to stumble across a ticket for a lovely vacation at sea! At least, until you discover that this boat can barely float!
■ DELICIOUSLY SWEET LEVELS - Explore dozens of levels and find huge candies to fuel the boat. From fruity cakes to tropical jungles to haunted floating islands (and more!), get bready for some tasty sights!
■ FRIENDLY TOASTS EVERYWHERE - You're not alone on this cruise; lots of other toasts are along for the ride! Get to know them: they’ve all got a good reason for being there. Maybe you can help them?
■ NEO-RETRO GAMEPLAY - Got a taste for platformers? Discover this toast's original moveset: slap, aerial dash, French toast (absorb and spit out liquid!!)... No spoilers, we'll stop the list here...
■ TONS OF COLLECTIBLES - Like collecting lots of shiny little things? You’re going to loaf it! Reach for the stars with 100% completion!!!
■ CHALLENGES FOR THE BRAVE - Want to give yourself a slice of hard mode? This cruise has some nice surprises in store! But don't panic, all these challenges are optional.
70010000094826.intro: Pardon My French Toast is a 3D platformer starring a slice of toast who covers himself in sweet spreads to get fun abilities.
70010000094826.name: Pardon My French Toast

70050000070106.description:
This DLC unlocks a brand new world for hexceed: Cetus! 
Puzzle your way through 150 new levels - this DLC introduces the brand new "Chain" mechanic! The hardest mechanic so far! The chain mechanic counts all the bombs attached to it in a continuous chain!
70050000070106.intro: Unlocks a new world for hexceed: Cetus brings 150 new puzzles and introduces the brand new "Chain" mechanic!
70050000070106.name: Cetus

70010000093187.description:
The Cat in the Hat once said, “It is fun to have fun, but you have to know how.” 

Everyone from the mischievous Dr. Seuss classic is here. Become smart and steady Sally, energetic wild card Johnny, cause double the trouble as Thing 1 & Thing 2 or be cheerful Little Cat A. And of course, the chaos conductor, The Cat in the Hat and anxiously wise Fish will be there to help, on this zany ride. 

Play solo or go against your friends, choosing from two trick-filled game modes. Fancy a game of chase? Then ‘Find the Cat’ will have you turning the house upside down looking for The Cat in the Hat. Or maybe you prefer getting into chaotic challenges? See how quickly you can capture penguins, decorate a cake, and who knows what else in the 18 minigames you can choose from.  

But the fun doesn’t stop there, just like The Cat’s hat, it’ll be full of tricks. With varying difficulty levels, long challenges and short, there’s something for everyone. 

Get ready for your house to be filled with giggles, groans, and glorious mayhem.  

ELEVATE YOUR GAME NIGHT: Dive into the mayhem solo or race to the end with up to 4 players.  

CLASSIC DR. SEUSS CHARACTERS: Play as Sally, Johnny, Thing 1 & Thing 2 and Little Cat. 

CHOOSE YOUR MODE FOR NON-STOP FUN: Pick from 18 entertaining minigames or find The Cat across 14 rooms. 

BOUNCE, CHASE & PAINT TO WIN: Compete for rewards. Will you find all the stickers for your book? 

A PARTY FOR ALL AGES: Re-play in different ways, with easy controls and varying difficulties.
70010000093187.intro: Join your favorite Dr. Seuss characters in 18 exciting minigames and challenges. Your house is about to be full of giggles, groans, and glorious mayhem.
70010000093187.name: The Cat in the Hat: Rainy Day Mayhem

70010000096680.description:
A vibrant sci-fi platform adventure game for the Nintendo Switch™, where you help Maxwell the dog explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces - by jumping, shooting, slicing, shrinking, warping and drilling.

Maxwell’s homeworld is nearing collapse. In a last ditch-effort to find help, he hyperjumps where no dog has gone before. Stranded, he finds himself on the edge of a hostile system - if there’s any hope of return and rescue he’ll need every friend (and every weapon) he can find.

Forced to confront this celestial expanse head on, Maxwell stays strong - determined to keep his head up and lend a helping hand to everyone he meets on his journey. Like all underdogs, the odds are stacked against him, but you can’t keep a good dog down.

Key Features
· Explore jam-packed levels with multiple routes
· Make 50+ friends & collect their friendship cards
· Upgrade your blaster with special abilities
· Find hidden areas and take on a variety of boss battles
· Local couch co-op multiplayer mode
· Bonus prequel content: Chapter Zero
70010000096680.intro: Help Maxwell explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces.
70010000096680.name: Goodboy Galaxy

70010000122696.description:
Join Noah and Mio, members of the two opposing nations of Keves and Agnus, on a heartfelt journey through a warring world with a dark secret. Traverse massive, fantastical landscapes and master seamless real-time RPG combat that has all been enhanced to run at 4K* resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second with smoother and sharper cutscenes. 

This Nintendo Switch 2 Edition also includes some additional content! Recruit a new Hero—complete with an additional quest—and put your strength to the test against waves of enemies in a new defensive battle mode. The game’s event scenes are now also fully voiced.

Already have Xenoblade Chronicles™ 3 for Nintendo Switch? Purchase the upgrade pack!   

If you already have the game for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the upgrade pack** separately to play this version on Nintendo Switch 2.
70010000122696.intro: Live to fight. Fight to live. Now with enhancements for the Nintendo Switch™ 2 system
70010000122696.name: Xenoblade Chronicles™ 3 – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70050000075214.description:
Enhance your adventure across Aionios with this upgrade pack. The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of this game features improved visuals, running at 60 frames per second with 4K* resolution in TV mode and full HD resolution in handheld mode, as well as smoother and sharper cutscenes. 

It also includes some additional content! Recruit a new Hero—complete with an additional quest—and put your strength to the test against waves of enemies in a new defensive battle mode. The game’s event scenes are now also fully voiced.
70050000075214.intro: Upgrade Noah and Mio’s heartfelt journey on the Nintendo Switch™ 2 system!
70050000075214.name: Xenoblade Chronicles™ 3 – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

Frightful Night

The holidays arrive in Ghost Master Resurrection with a new Christmas Market level, draped in lights, decorations, and false cheer. Mortals gather to celebrate, laugh, and shop—blissfully unaware that terror awaits just beneath the tinsel.

Carols echo. Shadows linger.

Every smile hides a scream.

The most wonderful time of the year is here—for you to scare!
